package rulecoverage

func PositiveRequestContextValueExtractionDuplicatedAcrossHandlers() string {
    ruleID := "request_context_value_extraction_duplicated_across_handlers"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Repeated current-user, tenant, locale, or auth extraction logic."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
